changes.value:
## What
Create `crates/swissarmyhammer-sem/` with Cargo.toml and lib.rs. Add it to the workspace members list in the root Cargo.toml. The crate re-exports the semantic diff engine without the git2 dependency.

Deps: tree-sitter (0.26), tree-sitter-* language grammars (0.23), serde (1, derive), serde_json (1), serde_yaml_ng (0.9), toml (1.0), xxhash-rust (0.8, xxh3), regex (1), thiserror (2), rayon (1.10)

NO git2 dependency.

Files:
- `crates/swissarmyhammer-sem/Cargo.toml` (new)
- `crates/swissarmyhammer-sem/src/lib.rs` (new)
- `Cargo.toml` (add to workspace members + dependencies)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-sem` succeeds
- [ ] Crate is listed in workspace members
- [ ] No git2 in dependency tree

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-sem` passes
- [ ] `cargo tree -p swissarmyhammer-sem | grep git2` returns nothing
